a:r.a:t: ] to prepare a financial and tax due diligence report in connection with the potential acquisition of [
] (‘Target’). The report has been prepared in accordance with our engagement letter dated [

Our work on historical trading comprises the period [
2022 to 2023 and year-to-date period until 30 June 2024
]. With respect to prospective financial trading, our scope of work includes [
] budget. We have analyzed the balance sheet as at 31 December [
], and our analysis of net working capital was performed on monthly balance sheet captions for the period [
Our tax review has been focused on key tax risk areas, and is based on information made available by Management, as well as interviews with Management.
Please refer to the appendices for a detailed
During the course of our work our main points of contact have been the Management of Target, represented by [
We attended a meeting with Management on [
], and have had regular follow-up calls with Management and communication through email.

Overall, we have had good access to Management, who have been helpful and put a significant amount of time and effort into this due diligence process by responding to our questions and requests in a timely manner.
The contents of our report have not been reviewed by the Management of Target and the factual accuracy of this report has not been confirmed by the Management.
The requested information has been provided through the virtual data room. As of the date of this report, all available requested information has been provided in a timely manner.
Our work has relied on certain key sources of information including, but not limited to; (1) [
]. We have had access to granular and relevant data i.e., transactional level), which in our view has formed a good basis for analyzing the key drivers of the business.
